svg.title: GDPR multi-agent compliance system — overview
svg.desc: Six-layer architecture: ingestion, scope gate, chunking, mapping, compliance checking, and reporting. Human review gates sit between layers 2, 5 and 6.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What document types does the GDPR compliance agent accept as input?')
g.text: PDFs, DOCX, privacy notices, DPAs, ROPAs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Ingestion Agent do in the GDPR compliance pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the Scope Gate Agent decide if GDPR applies to a company?')
g.text: Confirm GDPR applies; detect exemption claims

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When does the Scope Gate Agent escalate to a human reviewer?')
sendPrompt('How does the Chunking Agent split policy documents for GDPR mapping?')
sendPrompt('How does the Mapping Agent match policy chunks to GDPR articles?')
g.text: Keyword + semantic match → chunk tagged with
Chapter / Section / Article / Priority / HIL flag
Chunks grouped and indexed by article

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the P1 Gate Checker agent verify?')
sendPrompt('What does the P2 Core Checker agent verify?')
sendPrompt('What does the P3 Verify checker agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the P4 Conditional checker agent do?')
sendPrompt('How does the Human-in-Loop Router decide what to escalate?')
g.text: Route HIL-required findings to review queue

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the human reviewer do in the GDPR compliance pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the Report Aggregator produce at the end of the compliance check?')
sendPrompt('What does the final GDPR compliance report contain?')
g.text: Gaps · risks · HIL items · article scores
